description: This file defines a FastAPI router for the 'alerts' endpoint, including the route handler for listing alerts related to assets with low health scores. It specifies dependencies, query parameters, and the database query logic for retrieving alert records.

classes.name: AlertOutMVP
classes.description: Schema for outputting alert data, used in API response models.

methods.name: list[AlertOutMVP] list_alerts( limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list current alerts for assets with a health score below 40. Uses SQLAlchemy to query Alert and Asset models, filters alerts for red assets, and returns a list of AlertOutMVP models.

ctags.name: list_alerts
ctags.signature: ( limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=200, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
